name: coart
description: A native Codex infinite-canvas widget for visual ideation, AI images, HTML pages, slides, and annotation-led iteration.

interface.shortDescription: Think, generate, annotate, and present on an infinite canvas.
interface.longDescription: Coart combines a tldraw-powered native Codex widget with project-local storage and MCP tools for AI image slots, HTML drafts, slide decks, references, exports, and annotation-driven revisions.
defaultPrompt: Open the Coart canvas for this project.
Generate an image in the selected Coart AI image slot.
Use my selected Coart annotations to create a clean revision.
